description: Import the file 'gis_export_yxz.csv' from the Desktop into a blank TopoCal project. The file contains survey points with no header row, strictly formatted as 'PointNumber, Y_Northing, X_Easting, Z_Elevation, Description'. Ensure the import is configured to map the columns correctly for proper orientation. Export the drawing as a DXF file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oriented_survey.dxf'.
